SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF YING LUO IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY MANDARIN COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER CONNIE CHEN (#700105). DEFENDANT JOHN KEI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,110.00 FILED BY LUO, YING AS TO DEFENDANT KEI, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUO, YING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-15-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. CLERK CALLED PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT AND INTERPRETER'S OFFICE AND INFORMED PARTIES THAT THIS COURT DATE IS A SCHEDULED CLERICAL ERROR - NO NEED TO ATTEND. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $5610 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 11 PAYMENTS. THE 1ST PAYMENT OF $500 TO BE PAID ON MAY 5TH AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ON THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER BY ELECTRONIC PAYMENT. THE 11TH PAYMENT IS TO BE $610. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 15TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND A PENALTY OF $200 WILL BE ADDED. IF NO APPEARANCES, AT ANY OF THE PROGRESS REPORT DATES, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL AFTER THE RESOLVE DATE OF MARCH 5TH 2023, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES ARE TO HAVE NO IN-PERSON CONTACT WITH EACH OTHER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-05-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YING LUO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER CATHY CHANG. DEFENDANT JOHN KEI IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $5610 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 11 PAYMENTS. THE 1ST PAYMENT OF $500 TO BE PAID ON MAY 5TH AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ON THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER BY ELECTRONIC PAYMENT. THE 11TH PAYMENT IS TO BE $610. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 15TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND A PENALTY OF $200 WILL BE ADDED. IF NO APPEARANCES, AT ANY OF THE PROGRESS REPORT DATES, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL AFTER THE RESOLVE DATE OF MARCH 5TH 2023, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES ARE TO HAVE NO IN-PERSON CONTACT WITH EACH OTHER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUO, YING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEI, JOHN $200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF AGREED UPON PENALTY OF $200 FOR FAILURE TO KEEP TO PAYMENT SCHEDULE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUO, YING
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE DENIED.
ORDER AND STIPULATION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE, FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN KEI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-20-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YING LUO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN KEI IS NOT PRESENT. AT THE TIME OF THE CALLING OF THIS CASE, PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. HWA SHING KWEI, COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPERTER IS PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND IS DISMISSED FROM THE PROCEEDING AT 3:40 PM SINCE PIANTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MAKES HER APPEARANCE AT 3:45 P.M. JUDGE TONG TAKES THE BENCH TO ADDRESS PLAINTIFF IN MANDARIN. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTS TO THE COURT THAT SHE IS RECEIVING PAYMENT PER THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE DISPOSITION/MINI MINUTES OF MAY 4, 2022 FOR FURTHER DETAILS) APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCTOBER 20, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND A PENALTY OF $200 WILL BE ADDED. IF NO APPEARANCES, AT ANY OF THE PROGRESS REPORT DATES, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL AFTER THE RESOLVE DATE OF MARCH 5TH 2023, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES ARE TO HAVE NO IN-PERSON CONTACT WITH EACH OTHER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-24-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CALLED CLERK ON 10-19-22 INFORMING SHE IS UNABLE TO APPEAR TODAY'S PROGRESS REPORT HEARING DUE TO HER WORK SCHEDULE. PROGRESS REPORT 3-MONTH INTERVALS CONTINUED DATE AND TIME IS SCHEDULED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO MAKE AN APPEARANCE AS SHE IS DISAGREEING TO THE AMOUNT OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON APR-19-2022 IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $5610 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 11 PAYMENTS. THE 1ST PAYMENT OF $500 TO BE PAID ON MAY 5TH AND SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS ON THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER BY ELECTRONIC PAYMENT. THE 11TH PAYMENT IS TO BE $610. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JANUARY 24TH 2023 HEARING AT 10:00 AM IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND A PENALTY OF $200 WILL BE ADDED. IF NO APPEARANCES, AT ANY OF THE PROGRESS REPORT DATES, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED AT 3-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL AFTER THE RESOLVE DATE OF MARCH 5TH 2023, AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED ON APRIL 19TH 2022 HEARING, PARTIES ARE TO HAVE NO IN-PERSON CONTACT WITH EACH OTHER. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-14-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRRESS REPORT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KEI, JOHN HEARING SET FOR APR-19-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOHN KEI ON APR-19-2023 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF YING LUO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN KEI IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT IS UPHELD. DEFENDANT PAID OFF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BUT WAS LATE ON 2 PAYMENTS. THE JUDGMENT OF $200 IS FOR LATE FEE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
